//: AgentMesh hook wiring for Claude Code. Copy the 'hooks' block into your project's .claude/settings.json (or merge it in). Adjust the absolute path to agentmesh-pull.sh and set the three AGENTMESH_* env vars in your shell profile or here in the command. SessionStart pulls messages when a session starts/resumes; PostToolUse pulls after each tool call so replies arrive at the next turn boundary.
